hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if re.search(r'/(utils|RAG)/[^/]+\\.py$', f):
    result = subprocess.run(['/mnt/e/PersonalLibrary/.venv/bin/python', '-m', 'pytest', '/mnt/e/PersonalLibrary/tests/', '-q'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    out = result.stdout[-3000:] if len(result.stdout) > 3000 else result.stdout
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': out}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
